ocr_findings.description: Image shows 'コレが出る！' header banner at top of page and chapter sidebar '第2章 法務'; both absent from OCR — decorative/navigational elements only

Image top shows continuation of 解答2-18 explanation (lines about ア/イ/エ for 個人情報の第三者提供同意 question); the OCR file starts partway through with イ/ウ/エ explanations. Appears the file starts mid-answer-block — likely a page split issue, the full text visible in image is present in OCR.

reviewer_notes: 解答解説ページ for questions 2-19 through 2-22. All answer explanations (コンプライアンス, ソーシャルメディアポリシー, GDPR, 情報公開法) faithfully reproduced with full detail. GDPR explanation with a/b/c/d sub-items correctly structured. The page is an exam answer/explanation page, correctly classified as 'exam'.
